criteria.name: Cleaning Config
criteria.evidence: docs/cleaning-config.json does not exist. TestCleaningConfig fixture fails with FileNotFoundError. Ralph must create this file per spec.

criteria.name: enforce_quality() Function
criteria.evidence: src/pea_met_network/quality.py does not exist. All TestEnforceQualitySignature, TestValueRangeChecks, TestActionRecords, TestQualityFlagsColumn, TestFlatlineDetection, TestRateOfChange, TestCrossVariableChecks tests fail with ModuleNotFoundError. Ralph must create this module.

criteria.name: Pipeline Integration
criteria.evidence: No pipeline integration test yet. Ralph must wire enforce_quality() into the pipeline after resample and before impute.

criteria.name: FWI Output Enforcement
criteria.evidence: enforce_fwi_outputs() not importable — quality.py does not exist. TestFWIOutputEnforcement tests fail with ModuleNotFoundError.

criteria.name: Quality Enforcement Report
criteria.evidence: Depends on enforce_quality() which does not exist. TestQualityEnforcementReport fails with ModuleNotFoundError.

criteria.name: Manifest Registration
criteria.evidence: No test or implementation for registering quality_enforcement_report.csv in pipeline manifest.

criteria.name: Quality Flags Column
criteria.evidence: Depends on enforce_quality() which does not exist. TestQualityFlagsColumn fails with ModuleNotFoundError.

criteria.name: QA/QC Report Enhancement
criteria.evidence: No test for enhanced QA/QC report with enforcement counts. Ralph must implement and Martin should add tests.

criteria.name: Date Range Truncation
criteria.evidence: truncate_date_range() not importable — quality.py does not exist. TestDateRangeTruncation fails with ModuleNotFoundError.

criteria.name: Fast Test Suite Passes
criteria.evidence: Existing tests (excluding test_quality_enforcement.py) pass. Martin's 54 new tests correctly fail (TDD red phase).

criteria.name: No Out-of-Range FWI Inputs
criteria.evidence: enforce_quality() does not exist. Pipeline does not run quality enforcement before FWI calculation.

criteria.name: Flatline Detection
criteria.evidence: Depends on enforce_quality() which does not exist. TestFlatlineDetection fails with ModuleNotFoundError.

failing_nodes.message: File does not exist. Ralph must create per spec Section 'Deliverables > 1. Cleaning Config'.
Module does not exist. Ralph must create with enforce_quality(), enforce_fwi_outputs(), and truncate_date_range() functions.
All 54 tests fail — expected TDD red phase. Tests are well-structured and cover AC-DQ-1,2,4,5,7,9,12.

summary: TDD red phase review. Martin committed 54 well-designed tests for Phase 8 covering 7 of 12 acceptance criteria. The implementation (quality.py + cleaning-config.json) does not exist yet — all tests fail with FileNotFoundError/ModuleNotFoundError as expected. Ralph must: (1) create docs/cleaning-config.json per spec, (2) create src/pea_met_network/quality.py with enforce_quality(), enforce_fwi_outputs(), and truncate_date_range(), (3) wire quality enforcement into the pipeline. AC-DQ-3,6,8 have no tests yet — Martin may need a second pass after Ralph's initial implementation.
